case_title: RODRIGO VICENTE MORENO-MESA VS. STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORENO-MESA, RODRIGO VICENTE AS TO DEFENDANT STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP LYONS, SEAN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DUFFY, MICHAEL JOSEPH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORENO-MESA, RODRIGO VICENTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP LYONS, SEAN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DUFFY, MICHAEL JOSEPH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF STREETFIGHTERS USA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $16,909.91 PRINCIPAL, $162.24 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,372.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
